name: ManyChat
description: ManyChat chat marketing platform. Manage subscribers, tags, and send messages across Facebook Messenger, Instagram, WhatsApp, and SMS.

credential_fields.name: accessToken
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: ManyChat API token (generate from Settings > API in your ManyChat account)

tools.name: find_subscriber_by_phone
tools.description: Find a ManyChat subscriber by their phone number. Returns subscriber details including ID, name, tags, and custom fields. Phone number should include country code (e.g. +1234567890).

phone.description: Phone number to search for, including country code (e.g. +1234567890). Must match the exact phone stored in the subscriber's profile.

tools.name: find_subscriber_by_email
tools.description: Find a ManyChat subscriber by their email address. Returns subscriber details including ID, name, tags, and custom fields.

email.description: Email address to search for. Must match the exact email stored in the subscriber's profile.

tools.name: find_subscribers_by_name
tools.description: Search for ManyChat subscribers by name. Returns a list of matching subscribers with their details including ID, tags, and custom fields.

name.description: Name to search for. Matches against the subscriber's first name and last name.

tools.name: create_subscriber
tools.description: Create a new subscriber in ManyChat. Requires at least a phone number or email address. Optionally provide name, consent details, and opt-in preferences for SMS and email channels.

phone.description: Subscriber's phone number with country code (e.g. +1234567890). Required if email is not provided.

whatsapp_phone.description: Subscriber's WhatsApp phone number with country code.

email.description: Subscriber's email address. Required if phone is not provided.

has_opt_in_sms.description: Whether the subscriber has opted in to SMS messages.

has_opt_in_email.description: Whether the subscriber has opted in to email messages.

consent_phrase.description: The consent phrase acknowledged by the subscriber. Required if has_opt_in_sms or has_opt_in_email is true.

tools.name: update_subscriber
tools.description: Update an existing subscriber's custom field value in ManyChat. Use this to set or change any custom field on a subscriber's profile.

field_id.description: The custom field ID to update. Get field IDs from the page custom fields list.

field_value.description: The new value to set for the custom field. Can be string, number, boolean, or array depending on field type.

tools.name: add_tag
tools.description: Add a tag to a ManyChat subscriber by tag name. The tag will be created if it does not already exist. Use this to segment and organize subscribers.

subscriber_id.description: The unique ManyChat subscriber ID to add the tag to.

tag_name.description: The name of the tag to add. Will be created automatically if it does not exist.

tools.name: remove_tag
tools.description: Remove a tag from a ManyChat subscriber by tag name. If the subscriber does not have the tag, the request will succeed silently.

subscriber_id.description: The unique ManyChat subscriber ID to remove the tag from.

tag_name.description: The name of the tag to remove from the subscriber.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Send a message to a ManyChat subscriber. Supports text messages, images, buttons, and other rich content. The message_tag is required if the subscriber's last interaction was more than 24 hours ago (Facebook policy).

subscriber_id.description: The unique ManyChat subscriber ID to send the message to.

data.description: Message content object in ManyChat Dynamic Block format.

content.description: Content object containing the messages array.

messages.description: Array of message objects to send.

message_tag.description: Facebook message tag. Required for sending messages outside the 24-hour messaging window. Use ACCOUNT_UPDATE for account-related notifications, CONFIRMED_EVENT_UPDATE for event reminders, POST_PURCHASE_UPDATE for order updates.
